Tables and Lists

Basic Table

User Information
Name Email Role
Alice Johnson alice@example.com Admin
Bob Smith bob@example.com Editor
Carol Williams carol@example.com Viewer
Total: 3 users

Table with Column/Row Spanning

Category Q1 Q2
Revenue Cost Revenue Cost
Product A $10,000 $4,000 $12,000 $4,500
Product B $8,000 $3,000 $9,500 $3,200

Table with Column Groups

Language Type System Paradigm Year
TypeScript Static Multi-paradigm 2012
Rust Static Multi-paradigm 2010
Python Dynamic Multi-paradigm 1991

Unordered Lists

  • First item
  • Second item
    • Nested item A
    • Nested item B
      • Deeply nested item
  • Third item

Ordered Lists

  1. Step one
  2. Step two
    1. Sub-step a
    2. Sub-step b
      1. Detail i
      2. Detail ii
  3. Step three

Custom Start Number

  1. Item five
  2. Item six
  3. Item seven

Reversed List

  1. Third place
  2. Second place
  3. First place

Definition Lists

HTML
HyperText Markup Language, the standard markup language for web pages.
CSS
Cascading Style Sheets, a language for describing the presentation of HTML documents.
JavaScript
A programming language used to create interactive effects within web browsers.
Also used server-side with runtimes like Node.js, Deno, and Bun.
